title: Verify the loading page displays correctly
test_steps: Open the 'wine-searcher' app. | Navigate to the loading page (Screen ID: 12581). | Observe the status bar, header, and main content area.
expected_result: The status bar should display signal strength, battery level, and the time (3:01). | The header should show the app logo, app name 'wine-searcher', and a 'LIST' button. | The main content area should display 'Loading Location' centered on the screen.

title: Check if the circular button with a map icon is clickable
test_steps: Open the 'wine-searcher' app. | Navigate to the loading page (Screen ID: 12581). | Click on the circular button with a map icon located at the bottom right.
expected_result: The app should navigate to a map view.

title: Verify the app does not crash during loading
test_steps: Open the 'wine-searcher' app. | Navigate to the loading page (Screen ID: 12581). | Wait for 30 seconds to ensure the app does not crash.

title: Check for accessibility issues on the loading page
test_steps: Open the 'wine-searcher' app. | Navigate to the loading page (Screen ID: 12581). | Use accessibility tools to check for any issues.
expected_result: No accessibility issues should be found.
